subject: Sync up OOM with docker-manifest for 3.0.2
commit_message:
Sync up OOM with docker-manifest for 3.0.2

Change-Id: I8fae3bf8cc0fe113a0d15a588905a7837dd47072

Signed-off-by: Yang Xu <yang.xu3@huawei.com>
